children.text: Rev Lipstk Matte Stormy P Size .15z

Revlon Super Lustrous Lipstick82 SHADES in 4 FABULOUS FINISHES Infused with mega-moisturizers to seal in color and softness. Find your lip color amongst a dazzling array of 82 shade in 4 fabulous finishes of Matte, Pearl, Creme and Shine.- Exclusive LiquiSilk formula with mega-moisturizers seals in color and softness - Silky-smooth, creamy texture - Stay true color wears evenly Apply directly to lips for a high-shine look. Add Revlon Super Lustrous Lip Gloss for even more shine.
